response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and Dlang developer, but he fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of recent, hands-on C++ experience on Windows required for this role. His brief professional C++ exposure is over two decades old (from 2000-2001), and while he has some brief exposure to the capital markets domain via RIDE Capital, his core tech stack (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang) does not align with the backend financial systems requirements of this position.
strengths: Extensive software engineering background (25+ years) with strong CI/CD, Docker, and DevOps proficiency.
Prior exposure to the investment and capital markets domain via RIDE Capital.
Experience building high-performance, low-latency microservices using asynchronous I/O.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows.
Primary technical stack relies heavily on Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang rather than C++ and SQL Server/Oracle.
Lacks specialized knowledge in Fixed Income or complex Investment Banking systems.
